SEARCH

Package bupt.ta.servlet

package bupt.ta.servlet
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    bupt.ta
    BUPT International School teaching assistant recruitment system.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdminAiApiSettingsServlet
    Admin page for configuring the OpenAI-compatible LLM API.
    AdminDashboardServlet
    Admin home: overall recruitment summary + workload-rule settings.
    AdminEmailSettingsServlet
    Admin page for configuring SMTP settings used by email notifications.
    AdminMODetailServlet
    Admin read-only detail page for one module organiser.
    AdminMonitoringServlet
    Admin exception view: monitor status/data anomalies across the system.
    AdminTADetailServlet
    Admin read-only detail page for one TA.
    AdminUsersServlet
    Admin directory of platform users with cross-role summary metrics.
    AdminWorkloadServlet
    Admin: Check TA's overall workload - number of selected jobs per TA.
    ApplicantDetailServlet
    MO view of one applicant's profile, applications, and interview evaluations across jobs.
    ApplicationStatusServlet
    Lists the logged-in TA's applications with status summaries and timeline events.
    ApplyConfirmServlet
    Shows job + current profile/CV summary before POSTing to ApplyJobServlet.
    ApplyJobServlet
    Submits a TA job application and records the initial timeline event.
    CloseJobServlet
    Allows an MO to close or reopen one of their job postings.
    CVUploadServlet
    Uploads a TA CV (PDF/DOCX), stores the file, and optionally pre-fills profile fields via LLM.
    ExportWorkloadServlet
    Admin CSV export of TA workload derived from selected applications.
    ForgotPasswordServlet
    Password reset flow using email OTP when enabled in admin settings.
    JobSearchServlet
    TA job search with optional filters and rule-based skill match scores.
    LoginServlet
    Authenticates users and establishes a session; optionally issues a remember-me cookie.
    LogoutServlet
    Ends the current session and clears remember-me tokens for the user.
    MOApplicantSummaryServlet
    MO-only endpoint: generate AI summary for one application on demand.
    MOBatchApplicantServlet
    Batch operations for MO: mark PENDING as INTERVIEW, or send in-app interview notice to INTERVIEW applicants.
    MOInterviewCalendarServlet
    MO view: aggregate interview-stage applications across own postings into a simple date-grouped calendar.
    MOInterviewCalendarServlet.CalendarRow
     
    MOInterviewEvaluationServlet
    Saves or updates an MO interview evaluation for an applicant in INTERVIEW stage.
    MOInterviewSlotsServlet
    MO management of interview slots for one posting.
    MOJobDetailServlet
    MO view of a full job posting (same fields as TA-facing detail, without apply flow).
    MOJobsServlet
    MO dashboard listing jobs and applicants grouped by recruitment stage.
    MOMatchInsightServlet
    On-demand AI applicant insight for an MO reviewing a candidate, paired with /mo/applicant-detail.jsp.
    MOPastJobsServlet
    MO view for jobs that are closed or past application deadline (not shown on /mo/jobs).
    MOUpdateWorkTaCountsServlet
    MO updates structured work arrangements (and planned recruits) on an active posting; recomputes derived workload text.
    PostJobServlet
    Creates or updates an MO job posting, including structured work arrangements.
    RegisterServlet
    TA self-registration with email OTP verification when enabled in admin settings.
    SavedJobsServlet
    Shows TA saved jobs ordered by AI match score.
    SaveJobServlet
    Toggle save/unsave for TA jobs.
    SelectApplicantServlet
    MO pipeline actions: move to interview/waitlist, reject from pending or waitlist, select from waitlist.
    TADashboardServlet
    TA home: summary counts and quick links (replaces bare redirect from login).
    TAInterviewBookingServlet
    TA view to book, change, or cancel a slot for one interview-stage application.
    TAInterviewCalendarServlet
    Downloads an interview appointment as an .ics calendar file for the logged-in TA.
    TAJobDetailServlet
    TA-facing full job detail; apply is submitted from this page.
    TAMatchInsightServlet
    On-demand AI match insight for a TA viewing a job.
    TAMessagesServlet
    TA in-app messages: paginated list, filters, detail view, read / unread toggles.
    TAProfileServlet
    TA profile view and update (skills, availability, contact details).
    ViewCVServlet
    Streams an uploaded CV file for authorized TA, MO, or admin viewers.
    WithdrawApplicationServlet
    Lets a TA withdraw an application; may promote waitlisted candidates when auto-fill is enabled.
